28/04 Patchnotes:
- Brontes damage calculation adjustments, focused in skin mitigation.
- Fixed Headshot Precisiline in Brontes when using range weapons
- Brontes Tower new post processes and look dev
- Brontes Tower new spawners
- Brontes scream number of calls reduced by difficulty and or need of Brontes.
- Brontes more SFX and FX in most abilities.
- Brontes ability to cancel long abilities in case of danger added.
- Brontes regen per sacrifice reduced from 15 to 10
- Added all embrios to the arena
- New cutscene (WIP)
